description_long: This is a modern, single-basin kitchen or utility sink with a rectangular shape and integrated draining board. The sink features a deep, square basin on the right side and a flat draining area with subtle grooves on the left, designed to channel water back into the basin. A tall, angular faucet with a single lever is mounted at the rear left corner, positioned to serve both the basin and the draining board. The surface appears to be made of a smooth, matte composite material, likely a resin or granite composite, in a muted taupe or beige color. The drain is centrally located within the basin, and there are no visible overflow holes. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for installation in urban kitchens, garages, or utility rooms.
description: A modern, taupe-colored single-basin sink with an integrated draining board and a tall, angular faucet. The design is sleek, with a deep basin and smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep basin on the right, the flat draining board on the left, and the faucet mounted at the rear left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the square basin, faucet, and the overall rectangular shape of the sink.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the basin on the left, draining board on the right, and the faucet's rear mounting.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full layout: deep basin, draining board, faucet, and central drain.
